Free Downloads

Gentle help you can keep.

Free, printable guides for caregivers and grieving families — each a single page you can print for the fridge or share with someone who needs it. Join the list and they're yours.

✅ For caregivers

The Caregiver's First-Week Checklist

Just enough to get through the first overwhelming week of caregiving.

Get it free
🕯️ For grief

The First 30 Days of Grief

A gentle companion for the heaviest weeks after a loss.

Get it free
🧸 For families

Helping a Child Through Grief

Simple, honest words and small ways to support a grieving child.

Get it free

Why we give these away

Help first. Always.

These guides are drawn straight from The Cardinal's Promise and The Cardinal's Toolkit. They're free because the point is to help — and if they do, the books and the newsletter are there when you want more.

© 2026 The Cardinal Companion. Back to home · Crisis support: call or text 988 (US).
